The Scarecrow recounts his creation by a farmer and a Munchkin. He describes his first moments of consciousness on a pole and the pivotal moment when a crow informed him that he lacked brains.
Scarecrow sitting calmly by the brookside.
The narration of creation and the subsequent realization of missing brains.
